sourceMovie.title: Æon Flux
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Æon Flux works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Equilibrium
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Æon Flux clicked for you, Equilibrium (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Æon Flux?
faq.answer: Try Equilibrium, Alita: Battle Angel, The Transporter—each shares DNA with Æon Flux while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Æon Flux?
faq.answer: Æon Flux (2005) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Æon Flux worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
